---
title: 'Money Cometh!'
date: '2012-02-19T20:53:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7820459160314906599'
blogger_filename: '/2012/02/money-cometh.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Faith'
---

<br /><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: Calibri, sans-serif;">The Kids and I said “Money Cometh” on Friday morning… and I got a $1 bill in Cayman Islands Monetary Authority and $20 Peso bill&nbsp; and two coins.</div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: Calibri, sans-serif;"><br /></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: Calibri, sans-serif;">That makes me wonder...&nbsp;What else am I saying?</div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: Calibri, sans-serif;"><br /></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: Calibri, sans-serif;">The seed of your future is planted by your mouth, the present is the result of the seed you've already sown.&nbsp;</div>
